arts.ttl: Garnacho in Chelsea’s sights as ‘next transfer priority’ revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea were previously linked with a move for Garnacho during the January transfer window but were unable to agree a fee with Man Utd at that point. Chelsea are set for another busy summer in the transfer market, with Enzo Maresca’s side lining up a new striker to help fire them further up the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea focus on new top transfer target – how it impacts Man United
arts.sum: Chelsea are understood to have cooled their interest in Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho as they instead make Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens their top target. Sources close to the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Chelsea made contact over signing Garnacho in January, but are now focusing on Gittens for this summer.
